title: AMR Bot
description: AMR stands for Automatic Modular Robot.  A Robot-themed datapack. Explore new biomes, discover diverse modules, and assemble your own modular robot in Minecraft
body:
**A modular-robot datapack for Minecraft — explore new biomes, find and collect modules, and assemble customizable robots to suit any playstyle.**

## Key Features
- **Three robot types:** Unversal, Aerial, and Arsenal, each with distinct roles.  
- **Modular system:** Mix-and-match **Attack** and **Exploration** modules for tailored builds.  
- **New biomes:** Discover robots and modules hidden across freshly added biomes.  
- **Equipment and Energy ststem**：Added a set of equipment that can buff your energy system.
- **Emergent gameplay:** Find, combine, and upgrade modules to create unique robot loadouts.
